package rulecoverage

func NegativeGenericProcessExecuteHandleServiceNameWithoutDomainNoun() string {
    ruleID := "generic_process_execute_handle_service_name_without_domain_noun"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Generic service names and methods that hide business intent instead of naming the actual use case."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
